| Result  | Name        | Classname | Time (s) |
| ------- | ----------- | --------- | -------- |
| success | TestAlpha   | pkg/foo   | 0.10     |
| failure | TestBravo   | pkg/foo   | 1.50     |
| skipped | TestCharlie | pkg/bar   | 0.00     |
| failure | TestDelta   | pkg/bar   | 0.30     |
| success | TestEcho    | pkg/baz   | 0.05     |
